versions.description: City optimization, data compliance audit, UI improvements
changes: Added hidden field to SOT — 31 cities marked hidden, 120 visible in frontend
loadCities() now filters hidden cities; added loadAllCities() for data processing
HIDDEN_CITY_IDS added to lib/constants.ts for client-side filtering
generateStaticParams, sitemap, NavBar random, HomeContent search all filter hidden
Fixed citySlug.ts: added 8 missing slugs (159,162-168), removed 4 orphans (108,134,139,142)
Fixed San Jose US (ID 133): costModerate=4699, costBudget=3817 from verified Numbeo HTML
Fixed verify-numbeo-data.mjs: ID 70 URL corrected to San-Jose-Costa-Rica
City descriptions replaced with short descriptions (151 cities × 4 languages)
Hero section: grade module moved to independent row, warnings moved outside expand
Expand/collapse text unified to '展开明细/收起' across all locales
Created data/LICENSING.md — full licensing audit of 23 data sources
Created data/HANDOFF-LICENSING.md — handoff document for compliance work
Updated data/SOURCES.md with known data issues and corrected field source descriptions
Established data/cities-source.json as single source of truth (150 cities × 39 raw fields)
Created export pipeline (data/scripts/export.mjs) to compute 11 derived fields
Fixed confidence fields: safetyConfidence, freedomConfidence converted from string to numeric (0-100)
Created field registry (data/registry.json) with complete metadata for all 49+ fields
Moved raw source data from _archive/data_sources/ to data/sources/
Created enhanced validation script
Composite indices verified: safety, healthcare, governance, freedom all recomputed from raw data
